positive: A stylized celestial guardian figure woven from bioluminescent jungle flora and constellations. The composition is a central, symmetrical medallion design, featuring elegant, flowing lines of deep indigo, emerald green, and shimmering gold leaf accents. The figure should have clean, defined silhouettes against a solid, deep matte background. High contrast, geometric symmetry, intricate mandala patterning, linocut style combined with Art Nouveau aesthetics. Perfect for screen printing on fabric. Studio lighting, highly detailed, vector art.
